fault_hypothesis: The slice indexing on line 72 is incorrect. The upper bound `end + 1` is off by one, causing one too many elements to be returned when the page is not the last one.

constraints.intent: The returned page must not be larger than the requested page size.
The bug is only triggered when the intended slice range is fully within the bounds of the results list.
The off-by-one in the slice upper bound should not change the number of elements returned.
